scripts.cap:build:ios: npm run build && npx cap copy && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.electron-dev: concurrently "BROWSER=none REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://pastel-chat.onrender.com REACT_APP_IS_ELECTRON=true npm start" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron-build: cp .env.electron .env.local && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json && rm -f .env.local
scripts.electron-build:win: cp .env.electron .env.local && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.json && rm -f .env.local
